disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and darkening of vision come on immediately on standing from sitting or lying
trigger_question_examples: What happens when this comes on?
When exactly do you feel dizzy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The second I stand up, my vision goes black and I feel like I'm going to faint. It happens every single time I get up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms settle within seconds of sitting or lying back down
trigger_question_examples: What do you do when it happens?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: As soon as I sit down or lie flat it goes away within a few seconds and I feel normal again.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The dose of the patient's prostate medication was recently increased
trigger_question_examples: Have any of your medications changed recently?
Was any dose recently increased or added?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — the doctor recently put up the dose of my prostate tablet. That's the only change.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Earlier today the patient nearly fainted and collapsed back onto the bed while standing
trigger_question_examples: Have you actually fallen or passed out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: This morning when I got up I nearly blacked out and dropped straight back down onto the bed. I didn't hurt myself but it frightened me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dull aching across the back of the neck and shoulders comes on after being upright
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any ache or pain when you're standing?
Any neck or shoulder discomfort when you're up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I get a dull ache across the back of my neck and shoulders after I've been standing a while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No racing, pounding or skipped heartbeats; symptoms occur only on standing and never while sitting still
trigger_question_examples: Do you notice your heart racing or skipping?
Does it ever happen while you're just sitting still?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my heart doesn't race or skip that I notice, and it never happens when I'm just sitting — only when I stand up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The sensation is blacking-out and lightheadedness, not the room spinning around
trigger_question_examples: Does the room feel like it's spinning, or is it more like fainting?
Is it a spinning feeling or a going-to-black-out feeling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's not spinning — it's more like everything goes dark and I feel like I'm about to pass out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone and has restricted movement to bed and chair out of fear of falling
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone at home with you?
How are you managing at home with this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own. I've been staying in bed or my chair because I'm scared I'll fall and not be able to get up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no shortness of breath, and did not strike the head during the near-fall
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain or trouble breathing?
Did you hit your head when you nearly fell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain and my breathing is fine. I didn't hit my head — I landed back on the bed.
